ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number in the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name of the main referee */,
  "game_tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the team */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the fantasy team was founded */,
  "team_league" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy league */,
  "team_division" TEXT /* Division the fantasy team belongs to */,
  "team_record" TEXT /* Current record of the fantasy team (e.g., 5-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_team_players" (
  "fantasy_team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team player record */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_fantasy_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the fantasy team (e.g., QB, RB, WR, TE, K, DST) */,
  "player_fantasy_weekly_points" REAL /* Weekly fantasy points scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_players_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("fantasy_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number in the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_start_date" TEXT /* Date the injury started */,
  "injury_end_date" TEXT /* Date the injury ended */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the game */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the game */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_weather_conditions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" TEXT /* Whether the game went into overtime (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
